# Item Definition Template

- Id: string GUID-like stable key
- DisplayName: localized key
- ItemType: Equipment | Consumable | Currency | Material | Quest
- EquipmentSlot: optional slot enum
- Rarity: Common | Uncommon | Rare | Epic | Legendary
- MaxStack: integer
- Icon: addressable reference
- WorldPickupPrefab: addressable reference
- EquipVisualLabel: sprite resolver label key
- StatModifiers: list
- DropWeight: integer
- SellValue: integer
- Tags: list
